debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (quickSort α inst✝ l)

failed_attempts:
induction l using List.strongInductionOn with
  | h l ih =>
    cases l with
    | nil => simp
    | cons pivot l =>
      have : (smaller pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
        grind
      have : (larger pivot l).length < (pivot :: l).length := by
        grind
      rw [quickSort_cons, List.count_append, List.count_cons, add_assoc]
      rw [ih (smaller pivot l) (by linarith), ih (larger pivot l) (by linarith)]
      rw [count_sum_above_below_pivot pivot l x]
      simp [add_comm, add_left_comm]
